translated: And it came to pass that Pharaoh dreamed a dream, and Joseph interpreted it for Pharaoh, saying that seven years of plenty would be followed by seven years of famine. And Joseph said to Pharaoh, "Let Pharaoh appoint over the land a wise and discerning man, and let him appoint over the land officials to gather a fifth of the food of the land during the seven years of plenty. And let them store up the food of those good years which will be on the land, and let them keep it in the cities, and let them be a reserve for the land against the seven years of famine which will be on the land of Egypt, so that the land will not perish during the famine."
